entities.name: Careerspan
entities.context: V's company; platform where recruiters share candidate access

entities.name: Platform Abundance Mindset
entities.context: Philosophy of giving up exclusive talent pools to let platform value flow, even if another recruiter benefits

entities.name: Recruiter Network Effects
entities.context: Accepting that candidates using Careerspan may get jobs through other recruiters on the platform

relationships.context: Core operating philosophy for how Careerspan creates value
Network effects require giving up incumbent control
